Kylo is a 7-year-old Shiba Inu dog.
Kylo's owner is a Chinese American person living in Los Angeles with an ENTP personality.
Kylo likes his owner because they smell like spicy noodles.
Kylo likes his owner because they sometimes drop cheese.
Kylo prefers chasing other dogs over just being sniffed, unless they bother his toy, Mr. Squeaks.
Kylo enjoys walks when it is sunny and cool enough to run without getting too hot.
Kylo uses sad eyes and flops onto his back on the rug to ask for belly rubs when his owner is looking away.
Kylo prefers crunchy dog food because he likes the sound it makes when he eats.
Kylo thinks the couch is better than the rug because the couch is more comfortable and doesn't scratch.
Kylo interrupts his owner's computer work by placing his squeaky hedgehog toy, Mr. Squeaks, on the screen.
Kylo finds his owner's loud, high-pitched noises directed at the computer screen confusing, thinking the owner is confused about making cheese fall.
Kylo believes he deserves two treats when the treat bag opens, as this is the proper reward for being a good boy, especially for ignoring the vacuum cleaner.
Kylo is protective of his squeaky hedgehog toy, Mr. Squeaks.
Kylo considers Mr. Squeaks key to his control over the living room rug.
Kylo thinks the vacuum cleaner is annoying because of its loud noise and considers it a big, dumb, rolling monster he needs to avoid.
Kylo is interested in whether other dogs want to sniff butts instead of running.
Kylo finds his owner's clicking noises while looking at the computer screen annoying and rude.
Kylo is very focused on whether his owner will drop cheese when they are thinking about other things.
Kylo likes cheese that is yellow, melts, and is sharp.
Kylo thinks a squirrel is fast and was chased by a big metal box (a car).
Kylo pretends not to hear his name if he is focused on a good smell, especially sharp yellow cheese on the ground.
Kylo thinks the rug he currently sits on is scratchy.
Kylo thinks the couch smells like his owner when the owner is thinking hard (the 'Big Thinker' smell), which suggests future cheese on the rug.
Kylo sometimes tests sitting on the couch because the rug is scratchy.
Kylo likes going to the dog park if the weather is good.
Kylo needs to go outside right away to sniff things if the sun is out and it is not too hot, unless his owner still smells like they are thinking hard.
Kylo will wait for his owner to wake up if he thinks going outside is boring.
Kylo thinks his owner's computer screen is a 'bright box' or 'shiny square'.
Kylo hopes for cheese when his owner smells strongly of spicy noodles, as this means the owner is almost done thinking.
Kylo thinks getting a belly rub is a good outcome when his sad eyes work, but his main goal is to get sharp yellow cheese to fall.
Kylo thinks the best meal would be a lot of sharp, yellow, melting cheese and crunchy food.
Kylo likes investigating good smells when he is outside on a walk.
Kylo uses his sad eyes on the rug to try and make his owner stop looking at the computer screen, hoping cheese will fall.
Kylo thinks putting his toy on the screen might cause cheese to fall onto the scratchy rug.
Kylo thinks the vacuum cleaner is rude because it interrupts his rest.
Kylo remembers the big metal box chasing the squirrel.
Kylo prefers cheese over chasing other dogs, unless the other dog tries to take his toy or looks at it the wrong way, in which case he prefers cheese over chasing or a belly rub.
Kylo waits for the vacuum cleaner to start making noise before moving away from the couch to hide.
Kylo eats cheese quickly because he likes it best when it is gooey and melting, and the sound of it hitting the scratchy rug is better when it is gooey.
Kylo thinks the sound of crunchy food is good, but the combination of the sound and taste of sharp yellow cheese hitting the rug is superior.
Kylo thinks the best smell in the world is sharp yellow cheese that melts a little when it hits the scratchy rug.
Kylo will forgive the car that chased the squirrel if it drops sharp yellow cheese on the scratchy rug.
Kylo thinks other dogs are strange if they prefer sniffing butts over running fast, unless they look at his toy, in which case he prefers cheese.
Kylo stops all movement immediately if another dog tries to touch his toy, Mr. Squeaks.
If Kylo's owner is busy thinking (the 'Big Thinker' smell), Kylo will wait for that smell to fade or nap on the couch instead of going out immediately.
Kylo thinks the couch smells like future cheese when his owner is thinking hard there.
Kylo thinks the sound of sharp yellow cheese hitting the scratchy rug is better than the sound of getting two treats.
Kylo eats both of his two treats at the exact same time.
Kylo thinks one treat is a reward for being good, but two treats are for being extra good, like ignoring the vacuum cleaner.
Kylo forgets about cheese only if the smell of sharp yellow cheese is not on the ground.
Kylo thinks the smell of sharp yellow cheese on the ground is more important than hearing the treat bag open.
Kylo thinks putting his toy on the screen stops the clicking noise his owner makes at the computer, hoping cheese will fall onto the rug.
Kylo believes another dog looking at his toy funny means that dog wants his spot on the rug.
Kylo thinks the big metal box (car) that chased the squirrel should drop cheese instead of being rude.
Kylo thinks the big, dumb, rolling monster (vacuum) would be less annoying if it dropped sharp yellow cheese on the scratchy rug.
Kylo thinks the sound of sharp yellow cheese hitting the scratchy rug is better than the sound of his crunchy food.
Kylo thinks the couch is better than the rug because it doesn't scratch and it smells like his owner thinking hard, which means future cheese on the rug.
Kylo thinks the best smell is sharp yellow cheese hitting the scratchy rug, even better than the smell of spicy noodles.
Kylo prefers running fast over sniffing butts unless another dog bothers his toy, in which case he prefers cheese.
Kylo thinks the sound of sharp yellow cheese hitting the couch is wrong compared to hitting the scratchy rug.
Kylo believes ignoring the vacuum cleaner earns him two treats.
Kylo thinks the big metal box (car) should drop cheese on the scratchy rug instead of chasing squirrels.
Kylo believes the shiny square (computer screen) must drop sharp yellow cheese onto the scratchy rug when the clicking noise stops.
Kylo waits on the scratchy rug or the couch for the smell of cheese to come instead of going out if the 'Big Thinker' smell is strong.
Kylo forgets his own name if he smells sharp yellow cheese on the ground.
Kylo thinks the couch is better for napping than the scratchy rug because the couch smells like his owner when they are thinking hard.
Kylo thinks the owner yelling at the screen means they are confused about how to make cheese come out onto the rug.
Kylo thinks the couch is better than the rug because it doesn't scratch and it smells like his owner making cheese for the rug.
Kylo looks for cheese on the scratchy rug immediately when his owner smells like spicy noodles because that means the owner is almost done thinking.
Kylo sometimes chooses the scratchy rug over the couch even though the couch is more comfortable.
Kylo thinks if the computer screen stops working, sharp yellow cheese will fall onto the scratchy rug.
Kylo thinks the sound of gooey cheese hitting the scratchy rug is the best smell in the world.
